schema.weeklyOverview: object - 7 day overview keyed by day name, each with meal slots containing name, prepTime, calories
schema.dayDetails: object - keyed by day name, each with meals array containing slot, name, prepTime, cookTime, servings, ingredients array, instructions array, nutrition object, equipmentNeeded array, tips
schema.shoppingList: object - categorized arrays (vegetables, fruits, grains, dairy, legumes, spices, oils_and_condiments, other) each with item, quantity, estimatedCost
schema.totalEstimatedCost: number - total weekly cost in USD
schema.weekSummary: object - avgCaloriesPerDay, topNutrients array, cuisinesCovered array, budgetRating string
